source_item.title: AI won't diminish IT services, will instead make it more vital: Anand Mahindra at Tech Mahindra AGM

slide1_hook.label: Mahindra: AI Won't Kill IT Services
slide1_hook.subhead: He says AI makes India's $200-billion industry more vital.

slide2_backstory.label: THE BACKSTORY
slide2_backstory.headline: The Fear AI Would Gut IT Jobs
slide2_backstory.body: For two years, India's IT industry has feared AI would replace jobs. So all eyes were on what Tech Mahindra's chairman would say.

slide3_news.label: THE UPDATE
slide3_news.headline: Mahindra Says AI Is an Opportunity
slide3_news.body: At Tech Mahindra's 39th AGM, Anand Mahindra said AI will make IT services more important, not less. He said businesses still run on old, tangled systems, and someone needs to manage AI inside them.

slide4_why.label: WHY IT MATTERS
slide4_why.headline: Big Stakes for Jobs and Strategy
bullets: IT firms could shift from coding to managing AI
Govt picked Tech Mahindra for its national AI mission
Pushback on fears haunting India's 5 million IT workers

slide5_engage.label: YOUR TAKE
slide5_engage.headline: Mahindra says AI will make IT services more important, not less. Can India's IT giants actually reinvent themselves fast enough, or is this just AGM optimism?
slide5_engage.cta: Follow for daily Indian business stories that actually matter. Drop your take in the comments 👇
